name: MLS Season Pass shows all the scores of games!
snippet: Go to AppleTv app, select the settings option ( on top of screen on the far right) click down to Privacy section and turn Show Sports Scores off.

name: Matchday 31: What to know, how to watch on MLS Season Pass
snippet: Apple TV - Free = games are free to watch; you only need an Apple ID. Apple TV - MLS Season Pass = an MLS Season Pass subscription is required.
